inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's current body weight in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's current body weight in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden mevcut vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelles Körpergewicht des Benutzers in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel actuel de l'utilisateur en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal actual del usuario en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: User's height in centimeters, used for BMR calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's height in centimeters, used for BMR calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: BMR hesaplaması için kullanılan, santimetre cinsinden kullanıcının boyu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße des Benutzers in Zentimetern, verwendet für die BMR-Berechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de l'utilisateur en centimètres, utilisée pour le calcul du BMR.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura del usuario en centímetros, utilizada para el cálculo de la TMB.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: User's age in years, used for BMR calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's age in years, used for BMR calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: BMR hesaplaması için kullanılan, yıl cinsinden kullanıcının yaşı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Benutzers in Jahren, verwendet für die BMR-Berechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'utilisateur en années, utilisé pour le calcul du BMR.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del usuario en años, utilizada para el cálculo de la TMB.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 1 for male, 0 for female. Used in BMR formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for male, 0 for female. Used in BMR formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erkek için 1, kadın için 0. BMR formülünde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für männlich, 0 für weiblich. Wird in der BMR-Formel verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour homme, 0 pour femme. Utilisé dans la formule du BMR.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para hombre, 0 para mujer. Se utiliza en la fórmula de la TMB.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity factor: 1.2 sedentary, 1.375 lightly active, 1.55 moderately active, 1.725 very active, 1.9 extra active.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity factor: 1.2 sedentary, 1.375 lightly active, 1.55 moderately active, 1.725 very active, 1.9 extra active.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel aktivite faktörü: 1.2 hareketsiz, 1.375 hafif aktif, 1.55 orta aktif, 1.725 çok aktif, 1.9 ekstra aktif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor für körperliche Aktivität: 1,2 sitzend, 1,375 leicht aktiv, 1,55 mäßig aktiv, 1,725 sehr aktiv, 1,9 extra aktiv.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'activité physique : 1,2 sédentaire, 1,375 légèrement actif, 1,55 modérément actif, 1,725 très actif, 1,9 extra actif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de actividad física: 1.2 sedentario, 1.375 ligeramente activo, 1.55 moderadamente activo, 1.725 muy activo, 1.9 extra activo.

formulas.bmr: gender === 1 ? (10 * currentWeight_kg + 6.25 * height_cm - 5 * age + 5) : (10 * currentWeight_kg + 6.25 * height_cm - 5 * age - 161)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
